title: NoKeybindWarnings
description: This mod allows you to toggle warnings for multiple assigned keybinds in the options.
body:
Adds a simple checkbox in the Keybinds Option Screen to **disable** and **enable** warnings for multiple assigned Keybinds. 

Nothing much to it. But the warnings always just kinda bothered me :) 

The mod requires the [Fabric API]([https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)) to run.

![Difference with and without warnings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10db599532b709db833a67a6a01b0190bd600b07.png)
